title: tovomitopsis micrantha
intro: Tovomitopsis micrantha is a plant species that belongs to the family Clusiaceae and is commonly known as the Small-fruited Tovomitopsis. It is a shrub that is native to tropical regions and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, coughs, and respiratory issues, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Tovomitopsis micrantha can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in folk medicine to treat skin conditions and digestive issues.
